name: bible-app
description: Browser-based Bible reader with study tools, interlinear views, commentary, and analysis.

scripts.test: npm run test:static && npm run test:browser && npm run test:browser:mobile
scripts.test:static: node ./tests/integrity.mjs && node ./tests/run.mjs && node ./tests/capabilities.mjs && node ./tests/analysis.mjs && node ./tests/interlinear.mjs && node ./tests/ui-contracts.mjs && node ./tests/reader-ui-regressions.mjs && node ./tests/module-singletons.mjs && node ./tests/reference-context.mjs && node ./tests/tags.mjs && node ./app/scripts/accessibility-test.mjs && node ./app/scripts/doc-consistency-test.mjs
